description_long: This is a classic cylindrical fire hydrant with a domed top and a wide, flanged base, finished in a weathered reddish-brown color. The hydrant features two large side outlets for hose connections and a central front outlet, each capped with hexagonal nuts. The top of the hydrant is adorned with a prominent operating nut, and the body is reinforced with bolts around the base and the top flange. The surface shows signs of rust and wear, suggesting exposure to outdoor urban environments. No chains or manufacturer markings are visible, and the hydrant appears robust and solid, typical of those found on city streets.
description: A weathered, reddish-brown cylindrical fire hydrant with three capped outlets and a domed top, featuring bolts and a flanged base. The surface shows rust and wear, typical of urban outdoor hydrants.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a hexagonal nut and one side outlet visible, highlighting the domed top and flanged base.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both large hose connection outlets symmetrically, with the central body and base bolts clearly visible.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the front and one side outlet, emphasizing the depth of the central nut and the weathered surface.
description_view_3: Rear view with the back of the central outlet and both side outlets visible, showing the symmetry and robust construction.
